title: Multi-Script Poster
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for posters and public-information layouts that place many writing systems in one controlled composition.

en.title: Multi-Script Poster
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for posters and public-information layouts that place many writing systems in one controlled composition.

zh-CN.title: 多脚本同屏海报(4-9 语言)
zh-CN.description: 多脚本同屏海报：在菜单、议程、机场指示等场景中测试中、日、韩、阿拉伯、印地、梵文等非拉丁文字的同屏排版。
